pi_items.source: Verified against setup_task.sh which explicitly seeds an appointment service with the name 'Dermatology Consult'.
Task description requests the duration be set to 45 minutes. verifier.py checks for exactly 45.

pi_items.metadata_value: Comprehensive initial skin assessment and biopsy planning
pi_items.verified_value: Comprehensive initial skin assessment and biopsy planning
pi_items.source: Task description requests the description be updated to exactly this string. verifier.py performs an exact string match.

privileged_info_summary: The task relies on synthetically generated data via a shell script (setup_task.sh). An appointment service named 'Dermatology Consult' is inserted or reset to have a duration of 15 minutes and a description 'Standard skin check'. The task aims to alter this service's duration to exactly 45 minutes and its description to 'Comprehensive initial skin assessment and biopsy planning', which is confirmed as the target state in the verifier.
